current_role: Python & Django Developer / Emerging ML Engineer

projects.name: Image Classification Fruit
projects.description: An image classifier Django application utilizing HOG feature extraction and an SVM model to classify fruit images. Includes train.py for training models, preprocessing, and pickling labelers, scalers, and models.

projects.name: Personal Money Transaction Tracker
projects.description: A database-driven money transaction tracking application with full CRUD capabilities.

projects.name: User Management / Organization CRUD Projects
projects.description: Django-based applications handling user and organization CRUD flows, using .env for environment configurations.

career_goals.long_term: Build scalable, production-grade web systems powered by AI/ML models.
immediate_milestones: Bridge the gap between ML model training and backend API deployment (e.g., django-rest-framework or FastAPI).
Learn and apply Cloud AI deployment (AWS/GCP Vertex AI).
Obtain an industry-recognized cloud AI or professional Python certification.
